name: Jasper
summary: AI writing assistant for content creation
description: Jasper is an AI-powered writing tool that helps create high-quality content for blogs, marketing, and social media.

name: Zapier
description: Zapier connects your favorite apps and automates workflows without coding.

name: Canva
description: Canva is a user-friendly graphic design tool with templates for social media, presentations, and marketing materials.

name: Airtable
description: Airtable combines the power of spreadsheets with database functionality for project management and data organization.

name: Notion
summary: All-in-one workspace for notes and collaboration
description: Notion is a versatile tool for note-taking, project management, and team collaboration with customizable templates.

name: Mailchimp
description: Mailchimp helps businesses create, send, and track email campaigns with advanced automation features.

name: Trello
description: Trello uses boards, lists, and cards to help teams organize and track work in a visual way.

name: Slack
description: Slack is a messaging app for teams that brings all communication together in one place.

name: Google Analytics
description: Google Analytics provides detailed insights into website traffic and user behavior.

name: Stripe
description: Stripe provides payment processing solutions for online businesses with developer-friendly APIs.
